data.title: Ethereum Sets Record for Daily Gas Usage in July 2025
data.description: According to PANews, Ethereum's daily gas usage reached an all-time high of 149,673,860,000 on July 21, 2025. This milestone highlights the ongoing growth and vitality of the Ethereum ecosystem, with increasing on-chain applications, users, and real-world value. The rising gas consumption reflects genuine market demand and adoption trends.

data.title: Anchorage Digital Partners with Ethena Labs to Launch USDtb, the First GENIUS-Compliant, Federally Regulated Stablecoin
data.description: Anchorage Digital announced a strategic partnership with Ethena Labs to launch USDtb, the first stablecoin in the United States with a GENIUS Act compliance path. As the only federally chartered crypto bank in the United States, Anchorage Digital will issue USDtb in the United States through its stablecoin issuance platform, helping institutional clients access digital dollars in a compliant and secure manner. (Business Wire)

data.title: BNB Surpasses 770 USDT with a Narrowed 2.13% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jul 24, 2025, 13:35 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 770 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 770.52002 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.13% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Spirit Blockchain Capital Unveils New Strategy and Entity
data.description:
According to Odaily, Canadian digital asset management and investment firm Spirit Blockchain Capital has announced the launch of its Spirit Blockchain 2.0 strategy. This initiative aims to integrate a multi-token investment portfolio into its revenue strategy, with plans to expand its earnings program to include Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and Solana (SOL) in the fourth quarter of this year.

Additionally, Spirit Blockchain Capital has officially established a new entity, SpiritReserve Group. The company plans to raise up to $500 million in phases, focusing on strategic investments in the digital asset sector to enhance shareholder value.

data.title: Bitmine's Ethereum Holdings Surpass $2 Billion
data.description: According to Odaily, Bitmine has updated its Ethereum holdings on the X platform. As of 11:59 PM Eastern Time on July 23, 2025 (11:59 AM UTC+8), Bitmine holds a total of 566,776 ETH, valued at over $2 billion.

data.title: Binance to Host Discord AMA with Rewards for Participants
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the ongoing Binance 8YA celebrations will feature a special Discord AMA session. This event will highlight success stories from Community Associates, Angels, and Content Creators. Participants will have the opportunity to ask questions and potentially win rewards. The AMA is scheduled for 2025-07-25 at 15:00 (UTC).

Participants in the AMA can win $150 worth of Red Packets and Binance SWAG. To be eligible, users must join the AMA and look out for Red Packet codes shared during the session. These codes offer a chance to split $100 in USDC. Additionally, users who ask insightful questions using the hashtag #BinanceAMA in the #global-chat can win rewards. Binance will select 10 winners to receive $5 in USDC each. For Binance SWAG, the top three participants on the Kahoot quiz leaderboard at the end of the AMA will win exclusive items.

Only users who have completed identity verification (KYC) are eligible for rewards. Winners will be announced in the #discord-news channel within a day after the event. Unclaimed Red Packets will be distributed to winners' Spot Accounts within 14 business days. Winners of Binance SWAG must contact the activity manager within a week to arrange delivery, which may take up to 30 business days. In case of delivery restrictions, winners will receive a Red Packet of equivalent value. Binance reserves the right to disqualify participants for fraudulent behavior or interference with program operations. The company may also amend terms and conditions at its discretion.

data.title: Circle to Launch Interest-Bearing Stablecoin USYC on BNB Chain
data.description: According to PANews, Circle is set to introduce its interest-bearing stablecoin, USYC, on the BNB Chain. This stablecoin is backed by U.S. Treasury assets and aims to enhance capital efficiency for global users. The launch is expected to facilitate yield generation, maintain liquidity, and improve transaction speed, all while being operable across the blockchain.

data.title: OG bitcoin wallet from 2011 moves 3,962 BTC worth over $460M after 14 years of dormancy
data.description:
A 2011 bitcoin wallet just reactivated, moving 3,962 BTC now worth $468 M, shortly after other whales shifted more than 90,000 bitcoin to new addresses.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/364112/decade-bitcoin-wallet-address-whale?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: TotalEnergies says world faces oil oversupply risk as prices rise again
data.description:
TotalEnergies has warned that global oil markets are tipping into excess supply, as Opec+ increases production while demand keeps weakening. The alert came Thursday from the company’s Q2 earnings call, where it laid out how Saudi Arabia and its Opec+ allies are adding barrels back into the system in an attempt to grab market share. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/totalenergies-world-oil-oversupply-risk/

data.title: DOGE Pulls Back After Rallying — Classic Correction or Warning Sign
data.description:
The sharp sell-off suggests weakening short-term confidence, as traders exit to secure gains from the recent rally.
source: https://coindoo.com/doge-pulls-back-after-rallying-classic-correction-or-warning-sign/

data.title: Spirit Blockchain Capital Establishes New Entity, SpiritReserve Group, and Plans to Raise Up to $500 Million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Spirit Blockchain Capital, a Canadian digital asset management and investment listed company, announced the launch of the Spirit Blockchain 2.0 strategy, intending to integrate a multi-token portfolio into its income strategy, and is expected to expand its income plan to three cryptocurrencies, BTC, ETH and SOL, in the fourth quarter of this year. In addition, Spirit Blockchain Capital also announced that it has officially established a new entity, SpiritReserve Group, and raised up to $500 million in funds in stages, aiming to create shareholder value through strategic investments in the digital asset field. (Globe Newswire)

data.title: Bitmine updates ETH holdings: 566,776 ETH in total, worth over $2 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitmine officially updated its ETH holdings on the X platform. As of 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time on July 23, 2025 (11:59 today, Beijing Time), Bitmine held a total of 566,776 ETH, worth more than $2 billion.

data.title: Ji Hun Kim Appointed CEO of Cryptocurrency Innovation Committee
data.description: According to PANews, the Cryptocurrency Innovation Committee (CCI) has announced the appointment of Ji Hun Kim as its Chief Executive Officer. Kim has been serving as the President and Acting CEO of CCI since January 2025, following his previous role as the organization's Chief Legal and Policy Officer. In addition, SoFi, a prominent fintech and banking innovator, has officially joined the Cryptocurrency Innovation Committee.

data.title: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending July 19 was 217,000, while the expected number was 226,000.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending July 19 was 217,000, with an expected number of 226,000 and a previous value of 221,000. (Jinshi)
